channel.title: LLM Timeline — Partial License Models
channel.description: Models with some restricted access or partial weights

item.title: Engram (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 39.5B License: partial Type: model 39.5BA3.8B. "we explore conditional memory as a complementary sparsity axis, instantiated via Engram, a module that modernizes classic N -gram embeddings for O ( 1 ) lookup."

item.title: HOPE (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: partial Type: model "Combining our self-modifying sequence model with the continuum memory system, we present a learning module, called HOPE, showing promising results in language modeling, continual learning, and long-context reasoning tasks." Announce: https://research.google/blog/introducing-nested-learning-a-new-ml-paradigm-for-continual-learning/ May be released after paper is public.

item.title: GEN-0 (Generalist)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: partial Type: model "GEN-0, a new class of embodied foundation models built for multimodal training directly on high-fidelity raw physical interaction. Its architecture builds on the strengths of vision and language models while also going beyond them—natively designed to capture human-level reflexes and physical commonsense. One core feature is Harmonic Reasoning, in which the models are trained to simultaneously think and act seamlessly... GEN-0 is pretrained on our in-house robotics dataset, which includes over 270,000 hours of real-world diverse manipulation data, growing at a rate of 10,000 hours a week and accelerating."

item.title: ESM3 (EvolutionaryScale)
item.description: Parameters: 98B License: partial Type: model Biology large language model: "sequence, structure, and function are all masked and predicted during training, ESM3 can generate in all three modalities." 1.4B only released.

item.title: PanGu 5.0 Super (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: partial Type: model https://x.com/faridofanani96/status/1804079517193113850/photo/1

item.title: DCLM-Baseline 7B 2.6T (International)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: partial Type: model New dataset: 240T tokens: 8× larger than previous SOTA dataset. DCLM-Pool is 240T, DCLM-Baseline is 3.8T: "we combine our 3.8T DCLM-BASELINE with the StarCoder and ProofPile2 data to arrive at a 4.1T token dataset. We train a 7B model for 2.5T tokens" and "We release the DCLM benchmark, framework, models, and datasets at https://datacomp.ai/dclm."

item.title: LearnLM (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1500B License: partial Type: model Fine-tuned + prompted Gemini (Dec/2023). "The results of LearnLM-Tutor reproduce the performance of Gemini Pro, for example an MMLU score of 0.72 and MATH score of 0.33."

item.title: RFM-1 (Covariant)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: partial Type: model Commercial, multimodal for robotics

item.title: Samba-1 (SambaNova)
item.description: Parameters: 1400B License: partial Type: model CoE: Collection of experts: Llama2 7B / 13B / 70B Mistral 7B DeepSeek Coder 1.3B / 6.7B / 33B Falcon 40B DePlot CLIP Llava

item.title: Audio Flamingo (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 1B License: partial Type: model Project page: https://audioflamingo.github.io/

item.title: Fuyu-Heavy (Adept)
item.description: Parameters: 120B License: partial Type: model Fuyu-Heavy is the world’s third-most-capable multimodal model, behind only GPT4-V and Gemini Ultra, which are 10-20 times bigger.' Token estimate is based on Adept Persimmon-8B using many more tokens.

item.title: MedLM (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: partial Type: model Available to 'white-listed' orgs only.

item.title: Orca 2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: partial Type: model Llama 2 13B (2T) -> Orca 2 (GPT-4 finetune). Still an imitation model, overhyped: The False Promise of Imitating Proprietary LLMs https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15717

item.title: Gauss (Samsung)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: partial Type: model Gauss Language specializing in generating texts, Gauss Code on software and code description and Gauss Image for image creation.

item.title: Yasa-1 (Reka AI)
item.description: License: partial Type: model Multi-modal. No public arch info. Researchers from DeepMind, Google, Baidu and Meta building enterprise models

item.title: WormGPT ((Undisclosed))
item.description: Parameters: 6B License: partial Type: model GPT-J (2021) finetune/module.

item.title: Yasa (Reka AI)
item.description: License: partial Type: model No public arch info. Researchers from DeepMind, Google, Baidu and Meta building enterprise models

item.title: Orca (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: partial Type: model LLaMA -> Vicuna -> Orca (GPT-4 finetune). Still an imitation model, overhyped: The False Promise of Imitating Proprietary LLMs https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15717

item.title: 202305-refact2b-mqa-lion (Refact)
item.description: Parameters: 1.6B License: partial Type: model LiON vs Adam, code, RedPajama+The Stack

item.title: Formosa (FFM) (Asus/TWS)
item.description: Parameters: 176B License: partial Type: model BLOOMZ finetune? Chinese, Taiwan's first LLM. Subscription hardware: https://archive.md/cVdJt

item.title: LaMDA 2 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 137B License: partial Type: model Chatbot with tiny walled garden demo TBA

item.title: mGPT (Sber)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: partial Type: model 60 languages. Only 1.3B model available

item.title: Macaw (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: 11B License: partial Type: model Chatbot
